---
title: "Artifacts"
---

This page collects public-facing BEAR documents and outputs that are
useful without running the full repository workflow.

## Dataset appendix

- [Dataset documentation PDF](https://github.com/wwiecek/BEAR/blob/main/doc/datasets.pdf)
- [Dataset documentation source](https://github.com/wwiecek/BEAR/blob/main/doc/datasets.Rmd)

The PDF is the stitched appendix built from the dataset-specific
documentation fragments under `doc/datasets/` plus the shared p-value and
confidence-interval derivation notes.

## Repository artifacts

- [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/wwiecek/BEAR/releases) for
  `BEAR.rds` and other release-sized outputs.
- [Repository README](https://github.com/wwiecek/BEAR/blob/main/README.md)
  for the compact project entry point.
- [Dataset construction reference](https://github.com/wwiecek/BEAR/blob/main/doc/dataset_construction_reference.md)
  for source-selection and extraction-mode notes.
